sources.title: Bessemer Cloud Index: Developer Tools Segment
Clouded Judgement: DevTools Public Market Multiples
Yahoo Finance: Developer Platform Public Companies
Meritech Capital: SaaS Comps - Developer Tools

result.summary: Public developer tool companies trade at median 12x NTM revenue with a wide dispersion from 6x (mature, slower-growth) to 25x+ (high-growth, AI-adjacent), with the Rule of 40 score explaining 75% of the valuation variance across the cohort.
key_findings: Top-tier multiples (20-25x NTM revenue) commanded by Datadog, Cloudflare, and GitLab driven by 30%+ growth and expanding platform plays with net retention above 130%
Mid-tier (10-15x) includes Twilio, Elastic, and JFrog with 15-25% growth and stable margins, representing the most common comp range for Series C+ developer tool startups
Discount for profitability concerns has narrowed: unprofitable high-growth devtools traded at only a 15% discount to profitable peers in 2024, down from 35% in 2022
